title: Validate and hand off builder
description: Verify SSH, OpenCode binary, Zephyr environment, repository revision, Rust/Python/Renode tooling, then provide the SSH command and leave the instance running.
close_reason: Verified SSH, persistent mount, OpenCode 1.18.3 OAuth with gpt-5.6-sol, codereview commands, Hati dry-run, Beads, Rust/Python/Renode tools, clean repository revision, and native_sim/native/64 link_crypto 13/13 tests.
